mapper.sql: SELECT id, material_code, material_name, spec, unit, category, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag FROM sys_material WHERE del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
AND (material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR spec LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_material (material_code, material_name, spec, unit, category, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{category}, #{status}, #{createBy}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_material
material_code = #{materialCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, spec = #{spec}, unit = #{unit}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE sys_material SET del_flag = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_material WHERE material_code = #{materialCode} AND del_flag = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_material SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
